Name: Cassandra - Create database if not exists
Description: This template creates a keyspace on a Cassandra server if it doesn't already exist.  **Note** this template is written in Python and requires that `pip` is installed to function correctly.,

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.Server.Name
Parameters.Label: Server Name
Parameters.HelpText: Hostname or IP address of the Cassandra database server.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.Server.Port
Parameters.Label: Port
Parameters.HelpText: Port number that the Cassandra server is listening on.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.User.Name
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username of the account that can create databases.  Leave blank if not using Username/Password authentication.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.User.Password
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password for the user account that can create databases.  Leave blank if not using Username/Password authentication.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.Server.Mode
Parameters.Label: Server mode
Parameters.HelpText: The mode in which the Cassandra server is operating.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.Keyspace.Name
Parameters.Label: Keyspace
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Keyspace to create.

Parameters.Name: Cassandra.Replicas.Number
Parameters.Label: Number of replicas
Parameters.HelpText: The number of replicas to create.
